title: juniperus communis var. suecica
intro: Juniperus communis var. suecica, also known as Juniperus communis 'Suissa' or Swedish Juniper, is a variety of the common juniper plant that is native to Northern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of terpenes and essential oils. The health benefits of Juniperus communis var. suecica include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Juniper berries can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal properties and health benefits.
